highlights.Ed25519Provider.cs: 93% line (was 80%) — GenerateKeyPair catch still uncovered, acceptable

findings.issue: GenerateKeyPair catch block (lines 34-36) still uncovered. Hard to trigger — NSec key generation rarely fails.
findings.impact: Acceptable risk. The Sign and Verify catch blocks are now covered, which are the user-facing paths.
findings.suggestion: Not blocking. Could mock NSec internals but cost exceeds value.

findings.issue: No PLang .goal tests for provider module. Needs builder/LLM to create.
findings.impact: Full pipeline (builder → .pr → runtime) not validated for provider actions. Acceptable for now — C# tests cover the runtime layer.
findings.suggestion: Not blocking. Add when builder is available.

summary: All 1827 C# tests pass (8 skipped). Coder v2 resolved 11 of 13 findings with 28 new tests. Coverage dramatically improved: provider/list 0%→100%, load 28%→100%, SignedData.Verify guards now covered, all ResolveType branches tested, weak assertions strengthened. 2 minor remaining: Ed25519 GenerateKeyPair catch untestable, PLang provider tests deferred. Test quality is strong — assertions check Error.Key on all error paths, tests verify intent not just implementation.
